info.name: Gastrohub - Fase 2 - Automacao
info.description: Collection automatizada para validar fluxos de sucesso, erros tratados e cascade delete do GastroHub.

exec: pm.test('Owner user has USER_OWNER role', function () { pm.expect(body.roleName).to.eql('USER_OWNER'); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Email already exists', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Email already exists'); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is User not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('User not found'); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Invalid request data', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Invalid request data'); });
pm.test('Invalid opening hours returns 400', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Validation error', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Validation error'); });
pm.test('Restaurant belongs to owner user', function () { pm.expect(body.userId).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('ownerUserId'))); });
pm.test('Response is an array', function () { pm.expect(body).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Restaurant not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Restaurant not found'); });
pm.test('Invalid menu item returns 400', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(400); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Validation error', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Validation error'); });

item.name: 15 - Error Menu Item Restaurant Not Found

exec: pm.test('Missing restaurant for menu item returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Restaurant not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Restaurant not found'); });
pm.test('Menu item belongs to restaurant', function () { pm.expect(body.restaurantId).to.eql(Number(pm.collectionVariables.get('restaurantId'))); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Pizza Margherita {{runId}}",
  "description": "Molho de tomate, mussarela e manjericao",
  "price": 45.90,
  "availableOnlyOnRestaurant": false,
  "photoPath": "images/pizza-margherita.png"
}

exec: pm.test('List menu items returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Response is an array', function () { pm.expect(body).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Get menu item returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Update menu item returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Menu item name was updated', function () { pm.expect(body.name).to.include('Atualizada'); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Pizza Margherita Atualizada {{runId}}",
  "description": "Molho de tomate, mussarela, manjericao e azeite",
  "price": 49.90,
  "availableOnlyOnRestaurant": true,
  "photoPath": "images/pizza-margherita-updated.png"
}

exec: pm.test('Missing menu item returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Menu item not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Menu item not found'); });
pm.test('Cascade menu item created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Cascade Item {{runId}}",
  "description": "Item para teste de cascade por restaurante",
  "price": 29.90,
  "availableOnlyOnRestaurant": false,
  "photoPath": "images/cascade-item.png"
}

exec: pm.test('Menu item deleted by restaurant cascade returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Menu item not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Menu item not found'); });
pm.test('Cascade user restaurant created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('Cascade user menu item created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Cascade User Item {{runId}}",
  "description": "Item para teste de cascade por usuario",
  "price": 39.90,
  "availableOnlyOnRestaurant": false,
  "photoPath": "images/cascade-user-item.png"
}

item.name: 29 - Cascade Assert Restaurant Deleted By User

exec: pm.test('Restaurant deleted by user cascade returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Restaurant not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Restaurant not found'); });

item.name: 30 - Cascade Assert Menu Item Deleted By User

exec: pm.test('Menu item deleted by user cascade returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('ProblemDetail title is Menu item not found', function () { pm.expect(body.title).to.eql('Menu item not found'); });
pm.test('Delete menu item returns 204', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
pm.test('Deleted menu item returns 404', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(404); });
pm.test('Delete owner user returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Delete client user returns 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('Delete client role returns 204', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
